notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **The active tab now matches the note exactly.** It was rendering a touch
  lighter than the page — two translucent "glass" layers were stacking. The tab
  (and the tab bar) are now the *same* single surface as the note, so the active
  tab reads as a seamless extension of the page. "Match content" stays the
  default; choose **Accent** in Settings → Appearance to tint it instead.
  (Window Chrome & Appearance Spec §13 / §16.6 — "no double-stacked surfaces".)
- **Softer corners.** The global corner radius is now 8px (was 4px), rounding
  every surface — tabs, cards, menus, inputs, panels — a little more.
